---
title: "Cloud Boundary — Case Study"
subtitle: "Governing GCC Moderate compliance gaps with UIAO"
---

::: {.callout-tip}
## Case study in preparation
This case study is being developed from the GCC Moderate findings. For current coverage, see the [Findings section](/findings/) documenting specific GCC Moderate capability gaps and the [Boundary Authorization documentation](../compliance/boundary-authorization/index.qmd).
:::
